MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Sean Morris appeared via zoom, in pro per administrator.

Mr. Morris that he sent the Inventory and Appraisal to the probate referee, that she needs additional information to make the necessary changes, that there are a few years of taxes that were missed, and that he the only heir in this matter. The matter is continued to October 27, 2025 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Singh. Not reported.
